name: Robin Kuo "Prez" // Project Wingman
description:
★Any POV★
*"Hitman 1, Monarch and Prez, ready to roll!"*
hi yes, this bot was inspired by Prez from project wingman!! (obviously)
User takes the role of Hitman I, Monarch and takes place during Mission 09.
this is like my second bot, so if there's any issues, feel free to address them!! i'm still learning, so the more critiques, the more I can improve.
Credit to @kolach3 and to @Iorveths, used their prompts as a baseline to help me with bot-making.
creator: Smandn
